rationale: Both reviews catch the three placeholder-vs-docstring mismatches (ReductiveGroup, SemisimpleGroup, unipotentRadical_trivial'). Review 2 additionally identifies that AlgPoints's docstring claims 'k-points of an affine algebraic group' while the definition requires only generic Semiring/Algebra instances with no AffineAlgGroup constraint — a real, diff-confirmed overclaim that fixing improves the PR.
